---
title: "About"
image: data science.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicholas-huang-aus/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nicholashuang23

---

Hi!

I'm Nicholas Huang and I'm a passionate data scientist.

I've studied a Bachelor of Science majoring in Data Science at the University of Melbourne.
I've been working as a data analyst for 3 years now. 1.5 years at Infosys and currently 1.5 years at Roy Morgan.

I always been amazed by how Data Science can be utilised to make predictions and classifications about the world.
Being away from Data Science in the last few years has made me rediscover my passion for the field.
This blog is to document my data science learning journey.
